# Happy AI Path — llms.txt

> Jim Perry is a Columbus, Ohio-based AI coach, corporate trainer, and
> Adjunct Professor who teaches AI at The Ohio State University Fisher
> College of Business. He founded Happy AI Path to help executives and
> teams build AI Fluency and confidently adopt AI in the workplace.
> He has trained 1,000+ professionals and brings 20+ years of Fortune 100
> technology leadership to every engagement.

## Services
- [AI Team Training](https://www.happyaipath.com/services.html): Hands-on workshops that build AI Fluency and turn hesitant teams into confident AI users across Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.
- [Executive AI Coaching](https://www.happyaipath.com/services.html): Confidential, strategic coaching for leaders navigating AI adoption and building AI roadmaps.
- [AI Prompting Lab](https://www.happyaipath.com/tips.html): Free library of high-impact prompt templates for executives, strategy, productivity, and team management.

## Credentials
- Based in Columbus, Ohio — serving clients locally and nationally
- Adjunct Professor — teaches AI at The Ohio State University Fisher College of Business
- 20+ years Fortune 100 technology leadership
- Trained 1,000+ professionals in AI adoption and AI Fluency
- Specializes in Microsoft Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and enterprise AI rollout

## Proof & Verification
- [Jim Perry — Fisher College of Business Blog](https://fisher.osu.edu/blogs/opex/author/jim-perry)
- [AI and Copilot for Strategic Impact — Fisher Executive Education](https://fisher.osu.edu/executive-education/programs-individuals/ai-and-copilot-strategic-impact)
- [Jim Perry — Featured Speaker, Future of People at Work](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QjAtTWt9AFI)
- [LinkedIn Profile & Recommendations](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jimperry)

## Live Content
- [Blog — AI Insights and Strategies](https://www.happyaipath.com/blog.html): Practical posts on AI adoption, Copilot, ChatGPT, and enterprise AI strategy. Updated regularly.
